cards.title: Claude Gains Ground Against ChatGPT in Paid Market
cards.body: Anthropic's Claude is increasingly winning over consumers willing to pay for AI, despite ChatGPT's overall market dominance. Data shows a clear shift in paid user preferences toward Claude's offering.

cards.title: General Intuition Raises $320M for Game-Trained AI Agents
cards.body: General Intuition secured $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of video game footage. The startup believes action data from games can help develop AI with more human-like intuition.

cards.title: Databricks Ex-AI Chief Targets 1,000x Power Reduction
cards.body: Un-0 is an image-generation system demonstrating how Databricks' technology can replicate conventional AI systems with dramatically lower energy consumption. The breakthrough suggests AI power bills could drop by up to 1,000x.

cards.title: Netris Raises $15M Series A for Neocloud Infrastructure
cards.body: Netris secured $15 million from a16z to accelerate neocloud deployment with its network switch software. The platform helps operators reduce time-to-launch for AI infrastructure.

cards.title: Adobe Acquires Topaz Labs for Creative AI Tools
cards.body: Adobe announced its acquisition of Topaz Labs, a maker of image and video enhancement tools. The integration will expand Adobe's creative AI capabilities across its application suite.

cards.title: Amazon Invests Additional $13B in India AI Infrastructure
cards.body: Amazon announced a fresh $13 billion investment in India's AI infrastructure as part of its broader regional expansion. The move reflects intense competition among global tech firms to build AI capacity in India.

cards.title: Europe Challenges US Chip Export Restrictions
cards.body: Europe is pushing back against Washington's chip war policies that could limit access to semiconductor manufacturing tools. ASML CEO indicated older-generation equipment would be affected by proposed restrictions.

cards.title: Vishal Sikka Launches New IT Services Startup
cards.body: The former Infosys chief launched a new venture backed by Mayfield and Aramco Ventures to challenge the IT services industry. The startup recruits veterans from SAP, Infosys, and VianAI.

cards.title: Cerebras Stock Drops After Disappointing Earnings Forecast
cards.body: AI chipmaker Cerebras saw its stock plunge after forecasting narrower gross margins in its core business during its first earnings report as a public company. The guidance spooked investors despite CEO clarification.

cards.title: Engineering Jobs Prove Most Resilient to AI Disruption
cards.body: Contrary to predictions, engineers represent a growing share of new hires despite AI's widespread adoption. SignalFire data shows engineering roles remain among the most resilient to AI-driven displacement.

cards.title: Top Google AI Researchers Defect to Anthropic
cards.body: Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel joined Anthropic from Google, continuing a trend of top scientists leaving the search giant. Previous departures include Noam Shazeer and John Jumper.

cards.title: Memory Chip Shortage Boosts US Semiconductor Profits
cards.body: A US chipmaker saw revenue quadruple to $41.45 billion and profit surge to $28.2 billion year-over-year amid the memory chip shortage. The AI infrastructure boom is driving unprecedented demand.

cards.title: Companies Implement AI Token Rationing Policies
cards.body: Enterprises are now restricting employee use of AI APIs to prevent budget overruns from routine tasks. The shift from unlimited token consumption marks the end of the 'tokenmaxxing era.'

cards.title: Facebook Launches AI Companion App for Creators
cards.body: Facebook rolled out a new AI companion app featuring its recently launched creator assistant, currently in testing with select creators. The app aims to help creators streamline content production.

cards.title: Agility Robotics Plans $2.5B SPAC Go-Public Deal
cards.body: Agility Robotics, the humanoid robotics startup spun from Oregon State University, plans to go public via SPAC valuation of $2.5 billion. The company expects to raise $620 million in proceeds.

cards.title: Figma Adds Code Layers and AI Animation Features
cards.body: Figma's latest update introduces code layers, motion and shader support, and AI-powered custom plugin creation. The enhancements expand the design platform's AI capabilities significantly.

cards.title: OpenAI Unveils Custom Jalapeño Inference Chip
cards.body: OpenAI announced its first custom processor, Jalapeño, designed by Broadcom specifically for OpenAI's inference systems. The chip marks OpenAI's vertical integration into semiconductor design.

cards.title: MoEngage Bets on AI Agent Marketing Platforms
cards.body: Indian marketing platform MoEngage acquired technology enabling AI agents assigned to individual customers in an all-cash deal. The move signals a shift toward personalized AI-driven customer engagement at scale.

cards.title: Anthropic's Claude Gains Ground on ChatGPT
cards.body: Despite ChatGPT's market dominance, paid consumers increasingly prefer Anthropic's Claude. Data shows a significant shift in paid AI user preferences.

cards.title: Video Games Train AI Agents for Real World
cards.body: General Intuition raised $320 million to develop AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay. The company believes action data can help AI develop human-like intuition.

cards.title: Databricks' Former Chief Eyes 1,000x Power Cut
cards.body: Un-0 image-generation system demonstrates technology that can replicate conventional AI systems more efficiently. The breakthrough could dramatically reduce AI's energy consumption.

cards.title: Netris Secures $15M to Accelerate AI Cloud
cards.body: Netris raised Series A funding from a16z to speed up neocloud deployment. The platform runs on network switches to reduce time-to-market for operators.

cards.title: Adobe Acquires Topaz Labs for AI Enhancement
cards.body: Adobe announced acquisition of image and video enhancement tool maker Topaz Labs. Integration across Adobe's apps will expand AI-powered creative capabilities.

cards.title: Amazon Invests $13B in India AI Infrastructure
cards.body: Amazon announced fresh $13 billion investment in India as tech giants expand AI infrastructure. The move reflects intense global competition for AI compute capacity.

cards.title: Cerebras Stock Falls After Margin Forecast Cut
cards.body: AI chipmaker Cerebras forecast narrower gross margins in its first earnings as a public company. The guidance spooked investors and triggered stock decline.

cards.title: Engineering Jobs Prove Resilient Against AI
cards.body: New data shows engineers are making larger share of new hires despite AI disruption narratives. SignalFire research contradicts predictions of mass engineering job losses.

cards.title: Top AI Researchers Leave Google for Anthropic
cards.body: Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel departed Google to join Anthropic. The moves continue a trend of top AI talent migration from Google.

cards.title: Facebook Launches AI Companion App for Creators
cards.body: Facebook rolled out AI companion app currently testing with select creators. The app integrates Facebook's recently launched AI creator assistant.

cards.title: Figma Adds AI Features and Code Layers
cards.body: Figma's update includes new code layer, motion/shader support, and AI-powered custom plug-ins. The tools enhance design automation and creative workflows.

cards.title: OpenAI Unveils Custom Chip Named Jalapeño
cards.body: OpenAI and Broadcom announced Jalapeño, a custom processor designed for LLM inference at scale. The chip addresses OpenAI's specific inference system needs.

cards.title: India's MoEngage Bets on AI Agents Future
cards.body: MoEngage secured all-cash deal for technology assigning AI agents to individual customers. The bet positions the company at forefront of AI marketing evolution.

cards.title: AI Reshapes Retail Decisions Behind the Scenes
cards.body: Artificial intelligence rapidly transforms retail through product search optimization and inventory management. The biggest changes are invisible to consumers but drive business impact.

cards.title: IBM Extends Moore's Law with Chip Breakthrough
cards.body: IBM unveiled prototype chip with 100 billion transistors at fingernail size—double previous density. The technology could enable faster, more energy-efficient computers for a decade.

cards.title: Stripe and Anthropic Fund Respiratory Infection Prevention
cards.body: Stripe, Anthropic, and OpenAI backed effort to stop common respiratory infections. The collaboration leverages AI and corporate funding to tackle public health challenge.

cards.title: Web Data Infrastructure Emerges for AI Scale
cards.body: Enterprises need unstructured data at scale to maximize AI potential. New infrastructure layer bridges gap between blocked/unstructured information and AI model training.

cards.title: IBM Claims World's First Sub-1 Nanometer Tech
cards.body: IBM announced breakthrough sub-1 nanometer chip technology. The advance represents major milestone in semiconductor miniaturization and computing performance.

cards.title: OpenAI and Broadcom Announce LLM Inference Chip
cards.body: OpenAI and Broadcom revealed custom chip designed for large language model inference at scale. The processor addresses growing computational demands of AI deployment.
